title: A Resolution approving and adopting the Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Council Resolution No. 2025-12, dated November 17, 2025 entitled " Resolution realigning the balances and unutilized appropriations of the Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund Current Appropriation CY 2025 amounting to Two Million Four Hundred Forty-Nine Thousand Eight Hundred Six Pesos and 13/100 (Php 2,449,806.13) and reversion of continuing appropriations amounting to Five Hundred Thirty0
